basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on its official website https://www.iiti.ac.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow position on a contractual basis. Candidates with a Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or related disciplines and a maximum age limit of 35 years are eligible to apply online. The application process is open up to 13 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and online

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering or related disciplines
qualification.details: Minimum first class bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering or other related disciplines.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_indore_ii: Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering or related disciplines

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum first class bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering or other related disciplines.

IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore is July 13, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a minimum first-class bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or other related disciplines to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA), as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at the Indian Institute of Technology Indore.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow at IIT Indore is contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IIT Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Madhya Pradesh, but it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific state-wise eligibility criteria.
